home.subtitle: Umhlaba wokubhala wamahhala
home.emptyTagline: Indawo yakho yokuqala ingenalutho. Khetha ithempulethi ukuze uqale, noma uqale kusukela ekuqaleni.
home.tagline: Indawo ekhululekile yokubhala obudude — izindaba, ucwaningo, iziqephu, ijenali.
home.syncOnBody: Umsebenzi wakho uvumelaniswa ku-foldha ethi «{{folder}}» kule divayisi.
home.warningBody: Ayikho ukuvumelanisa kwedatha. Konke kuhlala esiphequluli sakho futhi ukusula isigcino sawo kuzakulahleka umsebenzi wakho. Ungavumela ukuvumelanisa kufoldha yendawo ku-Izilungiselelo Zomhlaba → Ukuvumelanisa.

about.title: mayelana
about.paragraph1: Loku kwenzelwe umbhali oqala kabusha ngaso sonke isikhathi. Lowo ovula idokhumenti entsha, abhale izigatjana ezintathu (noma ayikho), bese athi cishe amaminithi angama-40 elungisa uhlobo lwamagama. Lowo izinhlelo zakhe ezinhle ezibuya phakathi nobusuku futhi zimphazamise. Lowo onezikhangelo eziyishumi nane, amadaftha ayisithupha, nedaftha elingangeni phambili inyanga yonke.
about.paragraph2After: . Ngine-ADHD, Autism, mhlawumbe nezinye izinkinga ezingakatholi ukuxilongwa. Ngidinga okuthile okuzwisisa ingqondo yami eyinkinge kodwa emnandi. Indawo yokuphonsa konke ngaphambi kokuba kuphele (noma ukuqala ukubhala). Iziqephu, imicabango engaphelele, izixhumaniso zokusebusuku. Konke, endaweni eyodwa.
about.paragraph3: Ngakho-ke ngakha le ndawo ngakho sonke. Ngithemba izokunika intokozo ye-dopamine njengoba ingipha mina ngenkathi ngiyakha.
about.paragraph4Before: Into enye... Ngikholelwa kutheknoloji enhle futhi ngiyazonda izikhangelo. Ngakho-ke, loku kuzohlala kuvikelekile ezikhangelo futhi MAHHALA ukusetshenziswa okungeyona inzuzo. Ungakuguqula njengoba ufuna ngaphansi kwe-
about.statusValueRest: — ayikho ukuvumelanisa kwedatha. Yonke idatha igcinwa ku-IndexedDB kusiphequluli sakho sendawo. Uma usula isigcino sesiphequluli sakho, umsebenzi wakho uzalahleka.
about.feedbackAfter: . Ngingathanda ukuzwa okusebenzayo, okungasebenzi, nokufisa ukuba khona. Impendulo iwamukelekile.

language.title: Ulimi
language.subtitle: Khetha ulimi lwe-interface nezindaba ze-Help Center. Izinguqulelo ezisilele zibuyela ku-Siingilisi.
language.label: Ulimi lwe-interface
language.hint: Izinguquko zisebenza ngokushesha futhi zigcinwa kulesi siphequluli.
language.machineTranslationNotice: Izinguqulelo ngaphandle kwesi-Siingilisi zikhiqizwa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Siyaxolisa noma yimaphi amaphutha — thumela impendulo ukuze sikwazi ukuwaqondisa.

editor.title: Uhlelo
editor.subtitle: Ibha yamathuluzi nezidingongqangi zokubhala. Izikhombisi ze-Markdown (#, >, -, **) ziyaqhubeka zisebenze noma zinjani lezi zilungiselelo.
editor.floatingToolbarHint: Ibonakala uma ukhanyisa noma ucindezele okwesokudla kwindlela yokubhala.
editor.rightClickHint: Shintsha phakathi kwebar yamathuluzi entantayo nemenyu yesiphequluli.
editor.rightClickTooltip: Sebenzisa imenyu eyimvelo ekucindelezeni kwesokudla endaweni yebha yamathuluzi entantayo. Ibha yamathuluzi izovela ngesikhathi sokhanyiselo.
editor.inlineTogglesHint: Izinkinobho ze-Bold ne-Italic ngaphakathi kwebar yamathuluzi entantayo.
editor.inlineTogglesTooltip: Fihla izinkinobho ze-B ne-I ebheni yamathuluzi entantayo. Izikhombisi ze-Markdown (**, _) ziyaqhubeka zisebenze.
editor.listDepthHint: Ukujula amahlu ababili namanani angangena kuwo.
editor.listDepthTooltip: Phakamisa noma wehlisa umkhawulo wokujula kwehlu. Okwamanje kubekiwe emazingeni angu-2.
editor.templateDefaultsTooltip: Vumela itempulethi ngalinye (izindaba, ijenali, efuna umshini…) ukuba izikhethele iziseti zayo zokufomatha.

docInspector.title: Umhloli wedokhumenti
docInspector.subtitle: Khetha ukuthi yiziphi izinkambu ezibonakalayo kumhloli wedokhumenti. Ngalinye lingavaliwa jikelele futhi leqiwe ngalinye indawo.
docInspector.statusHint: Bonisa isimo sedokhumenti futhi uvale amadokhumenti aqedile ekuhleleni.
docInspector.wordLimitHint: Bonisa umkhawulo wokubalwa kwamagama ongawubeka ngalinye idokhumenti.
docInspector.charLimitHint: Bonisa umkhawulo wokubalwa kwezinhlamvu ongawubeka ngalinye idokhumenti.
docInspector.dueDateHint: Bonisa usuku lokuphela ongalubeka ngalinye idokhumenti.
docInspector.highlightHint: Phawula umbhalo onge naphezulu komkhawulo kumhleli.
docInspector.statusStagesHint: Khetha iziphi izigaba ezibonakalayo kokhetha isimo.

accessibility.title: Ukufinyelela
accessibility.subtitle: Lungisa i-interface yokweluleka neteknolojia yosizo. Inketho nganye iqala ngolwazi lwamanje — akukho okuguqukayo kuze ukhethe.

theme.label: Isifanekiso nombandela
theme.hint: Izifanekiso ezinamazinga omphakamisi ophezulu zihlangabezana nomkhawulo wombandela we-WCAG AAA.

linkUnderline.label: Hlala ukhomba izixhumaniso
linkUnderline.hint: Bonisa imigqa ukuze izixhumaniso zingathembeli kumibala yodwa.

focus.label: Isikhombisi sokugxila esinamandla
focus.hint: Sebenzisa umugqa omkhulu nombandela ophezulu uma ugxila.

reset.label: Buya ezimweni zokuzenzakalelayo
reset.hint: Buyisela ukugijima, ubukhulu bombhalo, isikhala semigqa, izixhumaniso, nokugxila ezimweni zazo zokuzenzakalelayo. Isifanekiso sakho asiguquki.

general.title: Jikelele
general.subtitle: Indlela LIpsum Writer ebonakala ngayo ngokuzenzakalelayo. Akukho okukonayo.
general.comingSoonBody: Ukuvina kwedensiti, ukunciphisa ukugijima, ukubonakala kwezifundiso zekhomputha, nokuvulwa kwini ekuqaleni.
general.compactDensityHint: Imigqa ekhinyabezekile emahlwini, ukuvina okunangcilenye yonke indawo.
general.keyboardHintsHint: Bonisa izikhombisi ze-⌘-key ku-tooltips nakogonqweni lwamathuluzi.

appearance.title: Ukubonakala
appearance.subtitle: Imibala, uhlobo lwamagama, densiti. Imizwa ofuna lolu hlelo ilubekele.
appearance.comingSoonBody: Amapaleti ezifanekiso eziqoqiwe, umbala wesikhombisi, nedensiti. Ukushintsha isifanekiso sanamuhla kusekulawuleni okusheshayo kwengwe yomhlaba.
appearance.themeHint: Amapaleti amathathu aqulunqiwe. Alungisa konke — imibala yamabhlogo, imigqa yezinwele, neyombhlaba.
appearance.accentHint: Kusetshenziswa ku-hover, ukugxila, indandatho yokuhlelela esebenzayo.

templates.title: Amathempulethi
templates.subtitle: Izinhlaka ezingasetshenziswa kabusha zezindawo namadokhumenti amasha.
templates.comingSoonBody: Bhala amathempulethi akho ngezigaba, amagama amandla odokhumenti, neziqephu zendaba.

palettes.title: Imibala yokukhanyisa
palettes.subtitle: Amapaleti amaslothi amahlanu ngalinye indawo — wahe amagama futhi lungisa imibala ngalinye.
palettes.comingSoonBody: Hlela, gcina, futhi shintsha amapaleti yokukhanyisa anesigama (Ubufakazi, Ukubuyekeza, Imiyalelo…) ezindaweni.

citations.title: Isitayela sokukhomba
citations.subtitle: Isitayela sokukhomba esizenzakalelayo ezindaweni.
citations.comingSoonBody: Khetha isitayela somhlaba (Chicago, APA, MLA…) nezinguquko ngalinye indawo.
citations.styleHint: Kusetshenziswa ukufaka isikhombo esisha. Izinguquko ngalinye indawo zizofika kamuva.

annotation.title: Iziqaphelo
annotation.subtitle: Amaqaphelo omkhondo nezikhombo ekhathalelwe umbhalo.
annotation.comingSoonBody: Izinhlobo zeziqaphelo, izimiso zokubona ezizenzakalelayo, nendlela yokuthumela.
annotation.showMarginHint: Amaqaphelo antanta ekhoneni elisokunene uma kunendawo.

export.title: Thuma / Ngenisa
export.subtitle: Susa idatha ngaphakathi nangaphandle kwe-LIpsum Writer.
export.comingSoonBody: Thumela ngokugcwele ku-.zip, ngenisa kusuka kwinqolobane enye ye-LIpsum noma indlela ye-Markdown.
export.formatHint: Ukuthumela ngalinye idokhumenti nangalinye indawo kusebenzisa okuzenzakalelayo okufanayo.
export.importHint: Letha inqolobane enye ye-LIpsum noma indlela yamafayela e-Markdown.
export.importSpaceHint: Letha indawo kulesi siphequluli kusuka ku-akayivi ye-Writer (.zip) — ukudownlouda isithombe sesimo noma ukuthumela ukuvumelanisa kwefoldha kusuka kudivayisi enye.
export.comingSoonHint: Thumela ngokugcwele futhi ngenisa kusuka kumafoldha e-Markdown noma amavault e-Obsidian.

data.title: Idatha yakho
data.subtitle: Lapho umsebenzi wakho uhlala khona nokuthi ithatha isikhala esingakanani.
data.comingSoonBody: Ukusetshenziswa kwe-IndexedDB, isilinganiso sesigcino, nokulayisha konke ngokucindezela kwakho.
data.wipeHint: Isusa zonke izindawo, amadokhumenti, nezithombe zesimo kulesi siphequluli. Ayikho indlela yokubuya.

about.title: Mayelana
about.subtitle: Ulwazi lokwakhiwa nezixhumaniso.
about.comingSoonBody: Bona ikhasi /about ngendaba; leli thebhu lizoba nolwazi lokwakhiwa, ilayisense, nomlando wezinguquko.

account.title: I-akhawunti
account.subtitle: Ukungena, ukuvumelanisa phakathi kwezidivayisi, namaziko omsebenzi axhumanisiwe.
account.comingSoonBody: Ukuvumelanisa kwefu akutholakali namuhla — i-Lotem iyendawo kuphela. I-akhawunti, ukungena, namaziko omsebenzi axhumanisiwe kuzofika ukuvumelanisa kukufika.
account.signedOutHint: Ukuvumelanisa kwefu akukho okwamanje. Lokhu kukhona ukuze kubonise umklamo.
account.syncHint: Uma ungene, izindawo zakho zizosinakwa kwezinye izidivayisi.

typography.title: Ukubhala ngezinhlamvu
typography.subtitle: Okuzenzakalelayo ezindaweni zonke. Umhlaba ngamunye unganqoba.
typography.comingSoonBody: Khetha uhlobo lwamagama lwendaba, uhlobo lwamagama le-UI, ubukhulu bokufunda obuzenzakalelayo, ubude bemigqa, nesilinganiso somhlaba omusha.

shortcuts.title: Izikhombisi
shortcuts.subtitle: Ukuboshwa kwezingonga zokukhomba ukuphaphatha, ukufomatha, nezindlela.
shortcuts.comingSoonBody: Izikhombisi ezingaboshwa kabusha zokubhala/ukufunda/ukuhlukanisa, indlela yokugxila, nebha yamathuluzi yokufomatha.

backups.title: Amakhophi asandulela
backups.subtitle: Thumela, buyisela, futhi thatha izithombe zedatha yakho yendawo.
backups.comingSoonBody: Izithombe zendawo ezihlelewe, ukuthumela ngesandla ku-.zip, nokubuyisela kubheki langaphambilini.

sync.title: Ukuvumelanisa
sync.subtitle: Sukazelela izindawo zakho kufoldha oyikhethayo. Khomba ku-foldha ye-Google Drive, Dropbox, noma iCloud ukuze uvumelanise phakathi kwezidivayisi.
sync.unsupportedBody: Ukuvumelanisa kwefoldha kudinga i-File System Access API, etholakala ku-Chrome, Edge, neziphequluli ezinye ze-Chromium ku-desktop. Shintsha kwisiphequluli esisekelelwa ukusisebenzisa.
sync.folderHint: Ukuvumelanisa ngakunye kubhala i-Markdown .zip ngalinye indawo lapha, igcina ezokugcina ze-5 kanye ne-latest.zip. Ukuvumelanisa kuhlukanisiwe ne-Amakhophi asandulela.
sync.intervalHint: Kangaki izindawo zivumelaniswa ngokuzenzakalelayo njengoba uhlelo luvulekile futhi ifoldha ixhunyiwe. Ngalinye indawo inganqoba lezi zilungiselelo zokuzenzakalelayo.
sync.pushOnlyHint: Ukusukazelela kuphela okwamanje — lokhu kubhala idatha yakho yendawo kufoldha. Ukudonsela izinguquko kubuye kuzofika kamuva.
sync.reconnectHint: Ukuvumelanisa kumisiwe — isiphequluli sidinga imvume yefoldha futhi kulesi sithangami. Xhuma kabusha ukuze uqhubeke ukuvumelanisa ngesandla nokuzenzakalelayo.

docInspector.title: Umhloli wedokhumenti
docInspector.subtitle: Nqoba izilungiselelo zomhloli womhlaba walesi simo sendawo.

palette.title: Iphaleti yokukhanyisa
palette.subtitle: Imibala eyisihlanu yokukhanyisa enamagama nezilungisiwe kule ndawo.
palette.comingSoonBody: Nika igama elisha, shintsha umbala, futhi phinda ulayisha iziqephu zokukhanyisa zalesi simo sendawo.

export.title: Thumela
export.subtitle: Susa okuqukethwe kule ndawo ku-ithuluzi lenye.
export.comingSoonBody: Thumela ku-Markdown .zip (namuhla nge-Amakhophi asandulela), LaTeX, HTML, noma PDF — konke endaweni eyodwa.

general.title: Jikelele
general.subtitle: Imininingwane ekhomba lendawo. Izinguquko zisebenza ngokushesha futhi zivumelaniswa phakathi kwezibukeli.
general.nameHint: Liboniswa ngohlaka lwesidini sakho nase-tooltip yeshila lendawo.
general.tagHint: Ikhodi emfishane (izinhlamvu ze-2–4) ezibonakalayo ku-thayili lendawo.

sharing.title: Ukwabelana
sharing.subtitle: Lawula indlela lendawo esetshenziswa ngayo.
sharing.comingSoonBody: Ukubonakala ngalinye indawo nezixhumaniso zokwabelana. Kuzofika ukuvumelanisa kwefu kukufika.
sharing.linkHint: Ukufunda kuphela ngokuzenzakalelayo. Amalungelo okuhlelela alandela Amalungu.

template.title: Ithempulethi
template.subtitle: Ithempulethi lomuklamo idalwe nalo lendawo.
template.comingSoonBody: Ukushintsha ithempulethi lendawo ngemuva kokudala akusekelwa okwamanje. Kuzofika uma singanqanqa izigaba namadokhumenti ngokuphepha.
template.changeHint: Ilungisa kabusha izigaba namadokhumenti akhona ku-ithempulethi elisha.

members.title: Amalungu
members.subtitle: Ababhali abaxhumanayo nabahlaziyi abanokufinyelela kule ndawo.
members.comingSoonBody: Mema ababambisani, lawula izindima, futhi hlaziya izinguquko. Kuzofika nokuvumelanisa kwefu.

backups.title: Amakhophi asandulela
backups.subtitle: Thatha isithombe sesimo salendawo njengo-.zip ongasiklandula, ugcine, futhi ubuyisele kusona.
backups.retentionHint: Igcina izithombe ze-{{count}} zakamuva — ezindala zisuswa ngokuzenzakalelayo.
backups.empty: Azikho izithombe okwamanje — dala enye nge-+ thatha isithombe sesimo manje.
backups.restoreUnavailable: Lesi sithombe sesimo sidlula ukusekela kokubuyiselwa — singaklandulwa kuphela.
backups.restoreDialogBody: Okuqukethwe okwamanje kwalendawo kuzobuyiselwa ngesithombe sesimo. Isithombe sesimo sezimo zamanje sigcinwa kuqala, ukuze ube nevolisa ukubuyisela loku.
backups.fileRestoreBody: Ngenisa ngokuya ku-Izilungiselelo Zomhlaba → Thumela / Ngenisa — ibuya njengeindawo entsha, ushiya le ingaqiniseki.

sync.title: Ukuvumelanisa
sync.subtitle: Sukazelela lendawo kufoldha exhunyiwe, ngesandla noma ngeshejuli. Ukuvumelanisa kuhlukanisiwe ne-Amakhophi asandulela.
sync.folderHint: Xhuma ifoldha ku-Izilungiselelo Zomhlaba → Ukuvumelanisa. Ifoldha efanayo isetshenziswa kuzonke izindawo.
sync.intervalHint: Kangaki lendawo ivumelaniswa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Khetha Okuzenzakalelayo ukuze ulandele izilungiselelo ze-ukuvumelanisa okuzenzakalelayo womhlaba.

danger.title: Indawo yengozi
danger.subtitle: Izenzo ezingaphindwa. Funda ngokunakekela ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.
danger.deleteCardBody: Isusa ngokuphelele lendawo nayo yonke idokhumenti, isigaba, inothi le-brain-space, isiqaphelo, isikhombo, noxhumano. Akubuyi.
danger.dialogBody: Lokhu kususa ngokuphelele indawo nokuqukethwe kwayo konke. Akubuyi.

templates.syncTooltip: Ukuvumelanisa kwefu akutholakali — lolu hlelo lweyendawo kuphela okwamanje.

dump.title: Brain space
dump.mobileWarning: Brain space isebenza kahle kakhulu kusikrini esikhulu.

canvas.pendingHint: shift-cindezela inothi elinye ukuxhuma · esc ukukhansela

drawer.title: Imininingwane yenothi
drawer.description: Hlela inothi elikhethiwe futhi lawula izixhumaniso zalo.
drawer.pictureLimitHint: umkhawulo we-{{count}} ufinyelele — susa enye ukuze weneze enye.

split.title: Isibukeli sokuhlukanisa
split.mobileNote: Vula leli dokhumenti kwindlela ye-Write esikhundleni sayo.

citationsDrawer.title: Izikhombo
citationsDrawer.description: Cinga, ngenisa, futhi thumela izikhombo zalendawo.

edit.confirmDeleteUsed: Lesi sikhombo sisetshenziswa ngamahlandla {{count}}× kumadokhumenti akho. Susa ngale kwazo zonke?
